CustomField.formula: HYPERLINK( "/lightning/cmp/c__lwcWrapper?c__lwcName=uploadStorePicturesLWC&c__versionId=" & CoverImgVersionId1__c & "&c__fileType="& CoverImgFileType1__c & "&c__contentBodyId="& CoverImgContentBodyId1__c & "&c__recordId="& Id & "&c__versionIdField=CoverImgVersionId1__c&c__contentBodyIdField=CoverImgContentBodyId1__c&c__fileTypeField=CoverImgFileType1__c&c__isImgManagement=true", IF ( ISBLANK( CoverImgVersionId1__c ), IMAGE("/logos/Custom/Plus_Primary/logo.png", "Review", 20, 20), IMAGE("/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/renditionDownload?rendition=thumb240by180&versionId=" & CoverImgVersionId1__c & "&operationContext=CHATTER&contentId=" & CoverImgContentBodyId1__c, "Preview is generating, please refresh later", 180, 240) ), "_parent" )
CustomField.label: Store Sampling Product Layout(Standard)2
